week1_summary: • TC “BAVI” is present over the eastern portion of the TCAD region. • Forecast indicates that TC ”BAVI” will enter the PAR (will be named “INDAY”) and move towards the Taiwan – Eastern China area; • Moreover, a TC-like vortex (TCLV) (1) is forecast to emerge over the eastern boundary of the PMD with a low likelihood of TC development during week-1.
week2_summary: • Forecasts suggest that TCLV (1) will enter the PAR with a low probability of TC development; • In addition, a TCLV (3) will likely develop over the western boundary of the PAR with a low likelihood of TC formation over week-2.
conclusion: Therefore, the TC-THREAT POTENTIAL IS ACTIVE over week-1 and LESS LIKELY in week-2.
